query: page count of Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky English translation
answer: The English translation of "Crime and Punishment" by Fyodor Dostoevsky has a print length of 624 pages, published by Liveright on January 15, 2019. This edition includes the novel's text and additional notes.
